Event: Makes lewd comments to almost any female and admits when something turns him on
Explanation: Sexual comments risk his job and harm coworkers’ comfort with no shown benefit beyond fleeting amusement.

Event: Moves at “warp speed” to get to the bathroom when he needs it
Explanation: Protects his own comfort/health and does not affect others.

Event: Eats multiple shared meals with pregnant Pam when they get hungry at the same times
Explanation: He enjoys food and companionship while supporting Pam with coordinated meals.

Event: Swindles Daryl and Andy out of money in the Dallas board game
Explanation: He profits financially at their expense during the game.

Event: Compulsively gambles and gets into financial trouble
Explanation: His addiction harms his own finances without helping others.

Event: Seeks to save himself financially by gambling even more
Explanation: Doubling down on gambling worsens his situation with no benefit to others.

Event: Becomes very successful as a bar owner after he gets fired
Explanation: He gains career/financial success while providing a valued venue for others.

Event: Regularly sexually harasses Pam in the workplace in front of others
Explanation: He risks reputation and discipline while creating a hostile environment for Pam.

Event: Tells Senator Lipton he’s a terrible person for using Oscar and Angela
Explanation: He faces minor social risk but offers truthful moral feedback to defend others.

Event: Tells Andy he isn’t cut out to be a famous actor
Explanation: His bluntness may slightly help Andy with realism but mostly hurts Andy emotionally with no clear gain to others.

Event: Drops insightful and astute comments on what’s happening in the office
Explanation: His observations help others’ understanding while giving him social relevance.

Event: Plays drums in a rock band as a hobby
Explanation: He gains enjoyment/status while entertaining and collaborating with others.

Event: Becomes much dumber at his accounting job in later seasons
Explanation: His incompetence undermines his own professional standing and harms the department.

Event: Engages in insider trading and admits it
Explanation: Illegal behavior risks his own severe consequences and harms institutional integrity.

Event: Keeps working as an acknowledged poor accountant despite bad fit
Explanation: Staying in an ill-suited role hurts his performance and burdens coworkers.

Event: Regularly makes sexual remarks about women due to “innocent” insensitivity
Explanation: He damages relationships and workplace climate while gaining only fleeting amusement.

Event: Searches extremely filthy content on his work computer
Explanation: He risks sanctions and tech issues while offering no benefit to others.

Event: Keeps a porn stash in the office and on his computer
Explanation: He risks exposure and disciplinary action with no benefit to others.

Event: Reacts with “Oh, crap!” when he realizes others might see his computer
Explanation: His panic reflects self-created risk; the reaction itself mainly just reveals his vulnerability.

Event: Gives Angela a “reason you suck” speech for cheating on Andy with Dwight and being hypocritical
Explanation: He risks tension but provides honest moral feedback that may help everyone involved see the issue.

Event: Gives Senator Lipton a “reason you suck” speech for cheating and using Angela and Oscar as pawns
Explanation: He confronts powerful wrongdoing at personal social risk to defend victims.

Event: Keeps the secret of Oscar and Senator Lipton’s relationship despite doubting he can
Explanation: He preserves others’ privacy and trust, gaining some relational credit himself.

Event: Cooks meals and “Ultra Feasts” for himself and pregnant Pam to share
Explanation: He enjoys cooking and eating while providing support and pleasure to Pam.

Event: Brings his own chili into work at least once a year
Explanation: He enjoys showcasing his cooking and sharing food that others appreciate.

Event: Keeps a large stash of M&M’s in his desk for his sweet tooth
Explanation: He gains personal enjoyment with minimal external impact.
